subcodes.first_line: Either journey thou thyself to Khurásán, or bring that enkindled leaf unto Tihrán. Negligence and delay are not permissible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خود به خراسان روید و یا آنورقهٴ منجذبه را به طهران آرید قصور و فتور جائز نه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions
